name: EuiBasicTable
description: Data table with sorting, pagination, and row actions. Use when data is fetched server-side.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

itemId.description: Describes how to extract a unique ID from each item, used for selections & expanded rows

itemIdToExpandedRowMap.description: Row expansion uses the itemId prop to identify each row

items.description: A list of objects to appear in the table - an item per row

columns.description: An array of one of the objects: {@link EuiTableFieldDataColumnType}, {@link EuiTableComputedColumnType} or {@link EuiTableActionsColumnType}.

tableCaption.description: Provides a description of the table’s content. If no description is provided, the table will default to the name Data Table.

rowHeader.description: Indicates which column should be used as the identifying cell in each row. Should match a "field" prop in FieldDataColumn

noItemsMessage.description: Message to display if table is empty

onChange.description:
Called whenever pagination or sorting changes (this property is required when either pagination or sorting is configured).
See {@link Criteria} or {@link CriteriaWithPagination}

tableLayout.description: Sets the table-layout CSS property. Note that auto tableLayout prevents truncateText from working properly.

responsiveBreakpoint.description:
Named breakpoint. Below this size, the table will collapse
into responsive cards.

Pass `false` to never collapse to a mobile view, or inversely,
`true` to always render mobile-friendly cards.
